name: Rho Sable
description: Demolitions expert and heavy weapons specialist. Brings overwhelming firepower and durability.

ability_slots.name: Suppressing Fire
ability_slots.description: AoE barrage of physical rounds. Hits all enemies in area and reduces their speed.

ability_slots.name: Proportional Response
ability_slots.description: Concentrated heavy fire on a single target. Devastating physical damage.

ability_slots.name: Breaching Charge
ability_slots.description: AoE thermal explosive. Deals thermal damage and destroys all cover in area.

ability_slots.name: Fortify
ability_slots.description: Brace and reinforce armor plating. Gain bonus armor for 2 turns.

ability_slots.name: Blast Shield
ability_slots.description: Absorb damage for an adjacent ally using heavy armor plating.

ability_slots.name: The Breachwright
ability_slots.description: Massive AoE detonation combining thermal and physical damage. Destroys all cover.
